main_raw_spectra_folder.description: Folder containing the spectra files to be analysed (Thermo raw, Bruker .d or mzML). All applicable files in this folder will be processed.

mcquac_params_file.description: The main parameters file for McQuaC

main_fasta_file.description: The FASTA file used for identification

RT_unit.description: Unit of the retention time, either sec for seconds or min for minutes.

output_column_order.description: Order of columns in the output table

spikein_columns.description: Columns of the spike-in dataframes that should end up in the result table

output_table_type.description: Type of the output table, either csv or xlsx

search_spike_ins.description: Parameter to check if a specific identification and feature extraction for spike in peptides / proteins should be performed. NOTE: FASTA has to contain the spike ins too!

search_labelled_spikeins.description: Perform a special identification and look for labelled peptides

metric_extraction_parameters.title: Metric extraction parameters
metric_extraction_parameters.description: Parameters used for the extraction of metrics

ms_run_metrics__bruker_raw_mem.description: Memory used for the extraction of metrics from Bruker headers

ms_run_metrics__thermo_raw_mem.description: Memory used for the extraction of metrics from Thermo headers

ms_run_metrics__mzml_mem.description: Memory used for the extraction of metrics from mzML files

ms_run_metrics__bruker_headers.description: Set if you want to extract specific headers from Bruker measurements, otherwise the default is used.

ms_run_metrics__thermo_headers.description: Set if you want to extract specific headers from Thermo measurements, otherwise the default is used.

base_peak_tic_up_to.description: Retrieve the Basepeak Intensity Max and the Total Ion Current from minute 0 up to the given number in minutes. Defaults to 105 (minutes).

filter_threshold.description: Threshold for the MS1 peaks, to be included in the output file. Defaults to 0.00001 (0.001%) of the highest overall MS1 peak. Values lower will be disregarded.

report_up_to_charge.description: Upper limit of range to be reported in a csv table for the charge, defaults to 5.

file_conversion__bruker_raw_conversion_m.description: Memory for the tdf2mzml to convert .d into mzML

file_conversion__bruker_raw_conversion_c.description: Number of CPUs / threads for the bruker raw file conversion

file_conversion__thermo_raw_conversion_m.description: Memory for the Thermo Raw File Parser to convert .raw into mzML
